name: Light weightlifting, Yoga, and 2000 steps walking
reply: Here is your plan for a  goal. Aim for 150 to 300 minutes of moderate aerobic activity each week plus 2 strength days, starting small if needed. You likely need more calories and protein than a fat-loss plan. Keep meals frequent and nutrient-dense.

name: Light weightlifting, Yoga, and 2000 steps walking
reply: Here is your plan for a muscle gain goal. Aim for 2 to 4 strength sessions per week and at least 2 muscle-strengthening days, with gradual progression. You likely need more calories and protein than a fat-loss plan. Keep meals frequent and nutrient-dense.
